title: The Deepwater Bride & Other Stories
author: Tamsyn Muir
description: Tamsyn Muir is a horror, fantasy and sci-fi author whose works have appeared in Nightmare Magazine , F&SF , Fantasy Magazine , Weird Tales , and Clarkesworld . Her fiction has received nominations for the Nebula Award, the Shirley Jackson Award, the World Fantasy Award and the Eugie Foster Memorial Award. She has spent the majority of her life in Howick, New Zealand, with time spent living in Waiuku and central Wellington. She currently lives and teaches in Oxford, in the United Kingdom. Tamsyn
